scores.notes: Company name partially correct but with case errors and missing words; address mostly correct but minor punctuation issues; date correct; total amount close but OCR shows multiple totals with slight discrepancies; table structure poorly preserved with garbled item descriptions and misaligned columns; numeric values mostly close but some decimals and amounts differ slightly; layout is somewhat jumbled with mixed sections and unclear reading order; overall, most ground truth text is present but with significant formatting and accuracy issues.
